summary: Batch-to-batch packing feature testing complete. All backend APIs and frontend UI working correctly. Fixed a bug in additional materials cost calculation where the rate lookup was using wrong field names.
passed_tests: BACKEND: GET /api/batches-for-packing/{product_name} returns batches with available_stock, batch_number, batch_date, batch_cost_per_kg
BACKEND: POST /api/packing-by-product with batch_id selects specific batch for packing
BACKEND: POST /api/packing-by-product with additional_materials deducts from raw_material_stock and calculates cost
BACKEND: Finished product document contains batch_number, semi_finished_cost, additional_materials_cost, total_packing_cost, cost_per_finished_unit
BACKEND: DELETE /api/packing/{id} restores both semi-finished stock AND additional material stock
BACKEND: Insufficient stock error handling works correctly
FRONTEND: Pack form shows batch selector dropdown with batch info (batch_number, date, available_stock, cost_per_kg)
FRONTEND: Pack form has 'Additional Raw Materials' section with add/remove functionality
FRONTEND: Material selector shows raw materials from raw_material_master
FRONTEND: Packing history modal shows batch number badge
FRONTEND: Packing history modal shows cost breakdown (semi-finished cost, additional materials cost, total, cost/unit)
FRONTEND: Additional materials details shown in history (e.g., 'SMP: 1 x 295 = 295')
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed additional materials rate lookup (lines 1033-1052): Changed from using 'material_name' and 'effective_date' fields to correctly use 'raw_material_id' and 'from_date'/'to_date' date range matching
/app/backend/tests/test_batch_packing_features.py - Created comprehensive test suite for batch-to-batch packing features
seed_data_creation: Used existing data: Paneer Block semi-finished product with 2 batches (B202603247534 and B2026032453FA), SMP raw material with rate 295/kg for March 2026
context_for_next_testing_agent: Batch-to-batch packing feature is fully functional. Key endpoints: GET /api/batches-for-packing/{product_name} returns available batches, POST /api/packing-by-product accepts batch_id and additional_materials. Cost calculation: semi_finished_cost = batch_cost_per_kg × total_kg_consumed, additional_materials_cost = sum of (material_qty × material_rate), total_packing_cost = semi_finished_cost + additional_materials_cost, cost_per_finished_unit = total_packing_cost / quantity_produced. DELETE /api/packing/{id} restores both semi-finished stock and additional materials stock.

bug_fix_applied.issue: Additional materials cost was always 0 because rate lookup used wrong field names
bug_fix_applied.root_cause: Code was querying raw_material_rates collection with 'material_name' and 'effective_date' fields, but the actual collection uses 'raw_material_id' and 'from_date'/'to_date'
bug_fix_applied.fix: Updated rate lookup to first get material master by name, then query rates by raw_material_id with date range matching

features: Calculates cost using rate from raw_material_rates
